title: Get team join date of a user through API
excerpt: Hello, is there any way to get the Date that a user joined a Team using the monday API?

posts.author: edhadgu (Elias)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, is there any way to get the Date that a user joined a Team using the monday API?

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @edhadgu,

Welcome to the community!

Unfortunately, returning the specific date is not possible. You can, however, query a team’s users and use an argument to return the newest ones first (see the docs here).

It would look something like this:

query { 
   teams (ids: 123456) {
      users (newest_first: true) {
        id 
      }
   }
}

While it isn’t quite the same data, you could also query a specific user’s creation date (see here).

I’ve changed your post to a feature request to add this functionality, so make sure to add your vote at the top of the page

Let us know if you have any other questions.

Best,
Rachel
